title: Skin Changer
description: A client-side mod for changing player skins using commands.
body:
The **Skin Changer Mod** allows you to easily change your Minecraft skin without restarting the game. With this mod, you can quickly switch between different skins and try new looks while playing.


[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_46h.png)](https://discord.com/servers/spunky-insaan-851780887271571456)

One of the best things about this mod is that it **works in singleplayer**, so you can change your skin anytime while playing your world. You can copy another player's skin, load a skin from a URL, or even use a skin file stored on your computer.

> ⚠️ **Note:**  
> Currently, this mod works **client-side only**. This means if you join a multiplayer server, the changed skin will only be visible to you. Other players will still see your original skin.

If this mod receives **good support and response**, a **server-side plugin version** may be developed in the future so that skins can work properly on servers as well.

---

## Commands

Here are the available commands in the mod:

- `/skinc player <username>` — Copy a player's skin
- `/skinc url <url>` — Load a skin from a URL
- `/skinc file <path>` — Load a skin from a local file
- `/skinc model <classic|slim>` — Set the arm model type
- `/skinc reset` — Reset to your original skin
- `/skinc help` — Show help and command list
